economic_notes: Investments in Centre Creek Management Ltd. (11%), Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Management Ltd. (14%), Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society (11%), Centre Creek Limited Partnership (11%), and Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Limited Partnership (14%). Gravel royalties of $287,437 and fish sales of $118,323 noted. COVID-19 noted as not significantly impacting 2021 operations.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2021 but audit report is dated January 5, 2023 — significant delay in filing. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (Centre Creek Management Ltd., Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe Management Ltd., Ch-ihl-kway-uhk Tribe Society) plus two limited partnerships (Centre Creek LP and Ts'elxweyeqw Tribe LP). No schedule of remuneration included. Capital Fund segment expenses of $206,723 represent amortization only. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($2,863,787) + FNHA ($823,061) + CMHC ($31,624) + other government per segment ($352,600 admin + $325,263 prior not used) = ISC + FNHA + CMHC = $3,718,472 per income statement; segment 'Other government' line shows $1,207,285 which equals FNHA + CMHC, so total government transfers = ISC $2,863,787 + Other government $1,207,285 = $4,071,072.
